captions: select the item next to the enable child lock icon
turn off icon to the left of the enable child lock
turn off the item above quick tips: app
flip to the go to rattle item

 1. Shake the device to scatter the objects OR tap them to make them dance!

 2. Hitting back button or swiping left/right changes the rattle.

 3. Gravity starts after 20 seconds.

 4. To enable child lock (disable home button) and/or force airplane mode on app launch, go to "Menu > Settings".

 5. Settings access code is 753.
